mentions.note: 80% B2B revenue (sticky, secular growth potential), expects 2028 breakeven vs. OpenAI 2030, $350B latest valuation; clear IPO candidate 2026; smartest tech people bullish.
Claude Code leading enterprise AI platform; valued at ~$350B; expected IPO could bring mega-supply shock of $35B+ depending on % offered.
Major Nvidia customer; adopted Nvidia architecture; extremely high compute demand; runs across multi-cloud (Azure, AWS, OCI) using Nvidia's confidential computing — critical AI model builder.
Private AI company making bold but false claims about eventual cybersecurity dominance; doesn't understand hands-on nature of cyber business; Wall Street rewards narrative despite falsehood.
Reports suggest October IPO targeting $60B+ raise; hyped Claude model, but mega-IPO market conditions deteriorating; timing unconfirmed.
Claude future usage intent at all-time high (40% of users will use more); crushing ChatGPT across all quality/usability metrics; dominating enterprise deployment.
AI models layer company. Recently joined Nvidia platform, contracting large GPU capacity, part of competitive buildout.
Real enterprise revenue growing; but valuation concerns on transition to public markets; IPO timing adds risk to broader market stability.
Claude shows 40% of users intend to use it more vs. only 6% less—extraordinary purchasing intent and pricing power. This is the deal Cramer wants investors in, ahead of SpaceX and OpenAI.
